CheckTitle: Okta API tokens are restricted to known Network Zones
Description: Okta API tokens should not be usable from Any IP. Each token must have a network condition tied to known Okta Network Zones.
Risk: An API token usable from any IP address can be replayed from attacker-controlled infrastructure if the secret is exposed.

Code.Other: Security > API > Tokens: edit each token Security section and select specific Network Zones instead of Any IP.

Recommendation.Text: Restrict each Okta API token to one or more known IP-based Network Zones.
